rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EMILIA DI FRANCO GLESSI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One And Production Of Documents; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Valerie F. Horn; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Anthony Muschi And Malcolm Leader Picone And His Law Firm Jointly And Severally In The Amount Of $2,500.00
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners' Motion for an Order Compelling Responses to Request for Production of Documents, Set No. One is denied without prejudice. The parties must meet and confer regarding the previously promised documents once an amended petition has been filed. This shall take place within one week of the filing of any amended petition. The requests for sanctions are denied. Respondent shall prepare a proposed order. Any party wishing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 10/15/2014.
